content.problemStatement:
For two positive integers aaa and bbb, let g(a,b)=g(a, b) =g(a,b)= gcd
(a,b)+(a, b) +(a,b)+ lcm(a,b)(a, b)(a,b).

For a positive integer NNN, let f(N)f(N)f(N) denote the **minimum** value of g(a,b)g(a, b)g(a,b) over all the pairs of positive integers (a,b)(a, b)(a,b) such that a+b=Na+b = Na+b=N.

Find out the number of **ordered** pairs (a,b)(a, b)(a,b) such that a+b=Na+b = Na+b=N and g(a,b)=f(N)g(a, b) = f(N)g(a,b)=f(N).


Input Format

The first line of input will contain an integer TTT — the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a positive integer NNN.


Output Format
For each test case, output the number of **ordered** pairs (a,b)(a, b)(a,b) such that a+b=Na+b = Na+b=N and g(a,b)=f(N)g(a, b) = f(N)g(a,b)=f(N).
